lines.speaker: Vyre Orator
lines.text: Only the Theatre can free you!

lines.speaker: Vyre Orator
lines.text: Verzik Vitur cordially invites you to the Theatre.

lines.speaker: Vyre Orator
lines.text: Welcome, one and all, to the Theatre of Blood.

lines.speaker: Vyre Orator
lines.text: Glory awaits those who enter the Theatre!

lines.speaker: Vyre Orator
lines.text: Prove your worth in the Theatre!
